translations.01KRNVKA3BXBZN6ECP3ZFRQ8HN: OpenCode 暂不支持在云端运行。请切换到 Local 或选择其他 harness。
translations.01KRNVKASTV9ND3H9QPRFS7XDF: 我们建议为云端 Agent 创建一个环境。
translations.01KRNVKASXXPR578VAJZ524AAZ: 我们建议为云端 Agent 选择一个环境。
translations.01KS2GEQMG7C2PFVN07W814BE5: 请为此 harness 选择一个 API 密钥以继续。
translations.01KQXQV12A2QPQYYHB2246D07X: 删除个人 Warp Drive 对象和偏好设置？
translations.01KQXQV12HJTSECKZQG3Y7YC6Z: Warp 检测到来自网页浏览器的新登录。按 escape 取消并在不登录的情况下继续使用 Warp。
translations.01KQXQV12ERZRQEBWCEM75SJT1: 按 enter 打开主题选择器，或按 escape 关闭。
translations.01KQXQV12J3ANC2TA34YHB51MA: 您因将 Warp 推荐给他人而获得了一款专属 Warp 主题。
translations.01KQXQV12JT1YJP63S9TH685A6: 您因被推荐使用 Warp 而获得了一款专属 Warp 主题。
translations.01KQXQV12EKR4TDJK8VJ0HB76M: 重启 Gemini CLI 以激活更新。
translations.01KQXQV12EP3989X9YDQBQMP84: 重启 Gemini CLI 以激活插件。
translations.01KQXQV12H3F8YS8XSM5WDDREK: Warp 插件已更新。请重启 Gemini CLI 以激活。
translations.01KQXQV12HRV34Q0KZKBYC869M: Warp 插件已安装。请重启 Gemini CLI 以激活。
translations.01KQXQV129F3NG7PYMRGSRSAMA: 自动模式会为任务选择最佳模型。“成本效率”侧重于降低成本，“响应速度”侧重于提升响应速度。
translations.01KQXQV12H71GYZDR05W9S78YD: Warp 对模型在我们的 harness 中表现优劣、消耗信用额度的速率以及任务速度的基准评测。

notes: auth_secret_types.rs: 'Bedrock API Key'/'Bedrock Access Key' are credential picker display_names -> translated (Bedrock/API kept English). 'AKIA...' and 'us-east-1' are literal placeholder example values (AWS key prefix / region) -> protocol_key. input_context.rs regexes: .expect() -> panic_message. orchestration_controls.rs: all UI labels/disabled-reason strings rendered to user (Agent kept, harness/OpenCode/Local kept as domain/brand) -> translated. auth_override_warning_body.rs: dialog headers, confirmation, a11y text -> translated. push.rs: toast messages + 'Included commits' label -> translated. notebook_command.rs: 'Ruby on Rails' is a fixed framework identifier in SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES list alongside untranslated Go/Java/Python -> protocol_key; 'Raw'/'Rendered' mermaid toggle tooltips -> translated. manager.rs: safe_warn!/safe_debug! macro args -> telemetry_payload. runner.rs: .context() error-context strings for plugin host failures, bubble to logs/dev console not UI -> telemetry_payload. reward_view.rs: referral subtitles + a11y -> translated. gemini.rs: install/update toast messages -> translated. block.rs lines 131-133: /// doc comment captured inside lazy_static! body -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; 'Active grid should exist'/'Prompt end point should be defined.' are .expect() -> panic_message. profile_model_selector.rs: model selector titles/descriptions -> translated (Warp/harness kept). cli_install.rs: 'Failed to ...' .context() error-context -> telemetry_payload; 'User canceled' is matched against osascript stderr output (external-format string) -> protocol_key. editor/render/element/mod.rs: all four .expect() -> panic_message. warp_completer/signatures/testing/*.rs: git command description fixtures + 'testing...' live under */testing/*.rs -> test_fixture.
